titleStmt.title: SII 16.333: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 333. (A.R. No. 18 of 1928.) GAṄGAVARAM, KALYANDRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock in a cotton field near the Lingāyat maṭha.
This is dated Śaka 1578, Durmukha, Vaiśākha ba. 10 corresponding to 1656 A.D., May 9, (Friday).

It records a cowl (kavulu) granted to several individuals such as Appaṇa-Dēvana, Hanumappa-nāyuḍu, son of Mārappa-nāyuḍu Nāma-reḍḍi Nāgi-reḍḍi of Ayidukallu and Siddaya-Kaduraya of Peḍakallu by Daḷvāyi Bācheppa-nāyaka, the agent of the king, in appreciation of their having settled the farmers in the village Gaṅgavaram which had become de-populated and, as a result gone fallow. The new settlers including those who undertook to settle them were given certāin privileges in various transactions and concessions in taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
rṣaṁbulu 1578 Agunanēṭi durmukhināma
saṁvatsara vaiśākha ba 10 lu śrīmadrājādhirā
jarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁgadēvamahārā
yalayyavāri kāryakarttalaina daḷavāyi bācepa nāyanivāru
Appaṇani dēvana mōṁka mārappanāyani komāruḍu hanumappa nāya
nigāru Ayidukaṁṭi nāmareḍi nāgireḍi peḍakaṁṭi sidaya
kadurayagāriki vēyiṁciyicina kavuluśāsanakrama meṭlaṁnanu
dēvādduladurgaṁ hōbaḷilōni prāku gaṁgavaraṁgrāmaṁ bahukālaṁ pā
ḍaivuṁḍagānu mīku grāmaṁ gaṭṭi kāpuladecci vūrjitaṁsēsē nimityaṁ kavulu
yedulu 8 manuṣyulu 4 ki maḍaka 1 ki Ēḍu 1 ki gutta yī tatsaṁtsarāniki
Ö1 . reṁḍōsaṁvatsaraṁ Ö2 . mūḍōsaṁvatsara Ö nālugōsaṁvatsaraṁ ga 3 Ayido
saṁvatsarānaku sālābārugānu ga 6 Āru varahālu yi maḍakalaku bedda
lu dhānyaṁlēdu vīru yeddula Aṁminā koṁnā suṁkhaṁ lēdu [Ammakālalō]
lōgūṭi Āvulaku ghaḍavarilēdu sidhāyaṁ kaṭṭugutta tappaka naḍapagalavāraṁ
Ī kāpukaṭṭu sisti daṁḍaga lēdu yī nāmireḍi nāgireḍḍigāriki meṭamānya Ara
maḍaka mānyaṁ sidaya kadurayagārki mānyaṁ pedarikāniki rēgaḍa kaṁdācāraṁ
� yiddumu vijaḷaṁmulaku
tama kāvalikāṇigi beḍikegrāma guttaku lōnidikādu
regaḍacēnumānyaṁ � . 0 kuṁcaḍu sthānamānyaṁ pūrvamaryāda
budaṇagauḍu karaṇaṁ la kaya vēśina śāsanaṁ
Ī kaulu naḍapani vāriki gōha The following lines are engraved at the top of the slab, three between the figures of and the crescent and two in the margin across the slab to the left of the sun:
nāgu
nalanāgireḍḍi
gāridi
kadiri
sidaya
Digital edition of SII 16.333 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
